title: Golden apple to Enchanted Apple
description: Switches golden apple to enchanted lmao
body:
I made a simple little Minecraft resource pack that changes the texture of the golden apple so it looks like an enchanted golden apple! That’s it — one small change, but it can cause a lot of fun when playing with friends. Imagine pulling out a regular golden apple, and everyone around you thinks you’re stacked with enchanted ones. You can totally troll your friends by flexing with “enchanted” apples when really, they’re just normal.

It’s perfect for messing around on servers or with your buddies in survival. They might panic, thinking you’re way stronger than you actually are. Or, you can hand someone a golden apple, and they’ll get excited thinking it’s the rare enchanted version… only to realize it’s just the regular kind. Their reaction will be hilarious!

This pack doesn’t change any stats, abilities, or effects — it’s only visual. The golden apple still works exactly the same as before, it just looks like the enchanted one. Super simple, but great for trolling, confusing your friends, or even just making your inventory look shinier.

If you like little troll packs, give this one a try and have fun tricking people. Yesh!
